summary: Comprehensive testing of FDE features for ETI Educom Lead Management System. Fixed critical backend bugs (TypeError for duplicate keyword arguments in Expense, Enrollment, and Payment creation). All backend APIs passing (17 passed, 1 skipped). Frontend UI tests passing for Expense Categories, Expenses, and Enrollments pages.

fixed.issue: TypeError - got multiple values for keyword argument 'expense_date'
fixed.fix: Added expense_data.pop('expense_date', None) before model construction

fixed.issue: TypeError - got multiple values for keyword argument 'enrollment_date'
fixed.fix: Added enrollment_data.pop('enrollment_date', None) before model construction

fixed.issue: TypeError - got multiple values for keyword argument 'payment_date'
fixed.fix: Added payment_data.pop('payment_date', None) before model construction

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console for table elements (span inside tbody)

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 backend bugs were caused by using **model.model_dump() and then explicitly setting date fields - when the Create schema has the same field name as the Model, this causes duplicate keyword argument error. Pattern fixed by popping the date field from dict before passing to Model constructor.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed expense categories and expenses created during testing. One enrollment for 'Krishna Mahajan' with payment plan and payments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All FDE features are working correctly after bug fixes. Features tested: Expense Categories CRUD (Admin), Expenses (FDE), Enrollments with multi-step form, Payment Plans, Payment Recording, Payment History. MSG91 WhatsApp API is MOCKED (returns success but doesn't actually send messages). Krishna Mahajan lead was enrolled and used for testing payments.

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: send_whatsapp_message function returns success but does not actually send messages - MOCKED

features_verified: Expense Categories CRUD in Admin Panel - WORKING
Expenses Page for FDE - add expense with category selection - WORKING
Enrollments Page - view converted leads ready for enrollment - WORKING
Payment Plan creation for enrolled students (one-time and installments) - WORKING
View payment history for enrolled students - WORKING
Navigation - FDE role should see Expenses and Enrollments links - WORKING
Admin role should see all pages including Admin Panel with Expense Categories tab - WORKING
